title: oldenlandia microtheca
intro: Oldenlandia microtheca is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the creeping rubia or creeping madder. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia microtheca include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Oldenlandia microtheca is often prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
